_note: DOUBT-PROBE follow-up: the naive edge_mean rule diffused but LEAKED (mean decayed). Hypothesis: edge_mean = a non-conservative consensus update (degree-biased at chain ends). The CONSERVATIVE form is the symmetric graph Laplacian: food += k*(edge_sum(neighbors) - degree*self), degree = edge_count(border). Predict: field (min heat) still rises = diffusion, AND mean food stays FLAT = conservation. If so: continuous conservative dynamics IS expressible with zero new primitives — but requires the author to pick the flux form, not the averaging form. Physics knowledge, not an engine gap.
